LanguageData.Ammo_6x24mmHarmonyCharged.description: Charged shot ammo used by advanced Harmony infused assault rifle designs.

LanguageData.Ammo_6x24mmSupremacyCharged.description: Charged shot ammo used by advanced Supremacy infused assault rifle designs.
